question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Apple holds the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.B: Huawei holds the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.C: Others holds the largest market share among the categories shown.
options.D: Samsung and Xiaomi together have a larger market share than Apple.

explanation: From the labels, Others has the highest share (47%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Huawei is largest when relying on visual comparison.
